type: space_on_a_page

# Increase trial conversion
metric:: Increase % of first-time users who convert from trial to paid

Our outcome is to increase the percentage of users who convert from trial to paid.

## Sign-up is too complex
source:: Interview with Sarah, 2024-02-10

Users report that the sign-up process is overwhelming and takes too long.

Interview with Sarah, 2024-02-10 - she mentioned she dropped off during signup because there were too many steps.

### Simplify sign-up flow

Reduce the number of steps required to create an account.

#### Can users complete signup quickly?
assumption:: Users can complete signup in under 2 minutes
category:: usability

Test whether users can complete the simplified sign-up in under 2 minutes.

## Pricing is unclear
source:: Support ticket analysis

Users don't understand the value proposition relative to cost.

### Revise pricing page

Clarify the pricing structure and highlight key features.
